pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for Java 17 instead of 21 if the release property is not updated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21, overriding or reinforcing the property setting.
